name: Legal Aid & Justice Authority
who_qualifies: Poor and vulnerable persons who cannot afford legal representation in criminal cases.
address: Ministry of Law and Justice, Islamabad

name: Free Legal Help Helpline
who_qualifies: Anyone seeking free legal information or guidance in Pakistan.

name: District Legal Empowerment Committees
who_qualifies: Citizens at district level seeking free legal aid and dispute resolution support.
address: District courts and LJCP coordination offices nationwide

name: Pakistan Bar Council Free Legal Aid Committees
who_qualifies: Indigent litigants who cannot afford a lawyer; availability varies by province and district.

name: Legal Aid Society (LAS)
who_qualifies: Low-income individuals and vulnerable groups in Karachi and Islamabad.

name: AGHS Legal Aid Cell
who_qualifies: Women, children, and other vulnerable persons in need of legal assistance.

name: PAWLA (Pakistan Women Lawyers Association)
who_qualifies: Women seeking legal support on family, domestic, and related matters.

name: Ansar Burney Trust
who_qualifies: Victims of human trafficking, illegal detention, and missing persons cases.
